SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-05-13: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.. 2026-05-13: Trump arrives in Beijing with CEOs ahead of Xi meetings : The president landed in the Chinese capital for a highly anticipated summit with Xi Jinping. . 2026-05-13: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.. 2026-05-13: Cisco's stock pops 14% as surge in AI infrastructure orders leads to increased guidance: Cisco's AI story has finally started resonating with Wall Street, with the stock hitting a record late last year and continuing to rally in 2026. . 2026-05-13: This low-profile stock in the semiconductor supply chain has doubled this year. Wall Street still loves it: Across the board, Wall Street analysts are bullish on Qnity Electronics and have raised their price targets on the stock. . 2026-05-13: Bulls bet big on these three China-related stock trades during Trump visit: Chinese stocks, ETFs and related themes posted some of the biggest rallies in months.. 2026-05-13: Altman details Musk's OpenAI fallout, says nonprofit was 'left for dead': Musk has accused Altman and another OpenAI co-founder of trying to \steal a charity\"". 2026-05-13: S&P 500 rises to another record on the back of tech even as majority of stocks close lower: Live updates: The S&P 500 rose to a new all-time high on Wednesday as traders' enthusiasm for the technology trade overshadowed another hotter-than-expected inflation report.. 2026-05-13: Mortgage rates jump to highest level since March on hotter inflation reports: Mortgage rates surged to the highest level since March in reaction to two hotter-than-expected inflation reports.. 2026-05-13: Beer demand stumbles as gas prices surge, data shows: U.S. beer sales slump as higher gas prices squeeze consumers, with convenience stores and high-fuel-cost states with higher-cost fuel seeing the sharpest declines.. 2026-05-13: Mortgage rates move to highest level in 5 weeks, but homebuyers shake it off: Mortgage rates continued to climb higher, but stronger homebuyer demand helped to keep mortgage applications in positive territory. . 2026-05-13: Gas tax holiday as Trump promises? Not so fast, trucking, construction industries say: President Donald Trump and lawmakers are eyeing federal gas tax relief, but opponents contend a pause wouldn't help consumers and could harm roads.. 2026-05-13: Allegiant CEO makes case for low-cost airline model as Sun Country acquisition closes: Allegiant CEO Greg Anderson said leisure travel demand is still strong despite higher fuel prices.. 2026-05-13: Tech is completely dominating the market. But these sectors could be poised to catch up: Frank Cappelleri breaks down the charts on these S&P 500 sectors. . 2026-05-13: AI-driven cyberattacks will start to be the 'new norm' in months, Palo Alto warns: The rise of increasingly sophisticated AI models is putting pressure on cybersecurity teams to step up their defenses for newer and faster cyberattacks. . 2026-05-13: Jamie Dimon warns JPMorgan may rethink new London office if 'very smart' Starmer is ousted as UK PM : Starmer's leadership is under pressure, sparking concern in the bond market. . 2026-05-13: Anduril doubles valuation to over $60 billion as defense tech funding boom continues: The company is working on space-based interceptors for Trump's $185 billion Golden Dome defense system. 2026-05-13: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war. . 2026-05-13: Amazon ditches Rufus chatbot, launches Alexa shopping agent in AI strategy pivot: Amazon introduced Alexa for Shopping, an e-commerce bot that can answer queries and take actions on behalf of users. 2026-05-13: The gold chart looks poised for a bounce. How to play it for less: If you've been watching the SPDR Gold Shares (GLD), you know the yellow metal has been consolidating and appears to be bouncing off its 150-day moving average (support).. 2026-05-13: This map shows the average credit score by state. Where does yours rank?: CNBC Select takes a look at the states with the highest and lowest credit scores, and some tools to help improve your own. 2026-05-13: Hyperscalers' AI buildout will require massive amounts of energy. Two under-the-radar stocks will benefit: The magnitude of the A.I. capital spending boom is historic and the dollar values are staggering. . 2026-05-13: Alibaba jumps as it strikes bullish tone on AI investments, even as profit plunges: Alibaba on Wednesday said its core profitability plunged in the March quarter amid heavy investments in tech and e-commerce.. 2026-05-13: South Carolina Supreme Court overturns Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions in deaths of wife and son: The ruling is a win for Murdaugh, who has adamantly denied killing his wife Maggie and younger son Paul since he found their bodies outside their home in 2021.. 2026-05-13: 10-year Treasury yield hits new high for the year after very hot producer prices reading: Treasury yields climbed after a hotter-than-expected reading on the producer price index.. 2026-05-13: Nvidia's Jensen Huang bets on this British startup to build 'next frontier' of AI: Months-old Ineffable Intelligence announced a record $1.1 billion seed round in April.. 2026-05-13: Air India cuts international flights amid Middle East conflict: The Iran war has triggered airspace closures, forced longer reroutings and driven a sharp rise in global fuel costs, adding pressure on global airlines.. 2026-05-13: Hormuz closure cuts OPEC oil production by 30% and threatens demand growth this year, cartel says: Global demand is facing constraints because supply from the Persian Gulf has been effectively cut off by Iran's blockade of the Strait of the Hormuz. . 2026-05-13: Capital One files lawsuit against alleged 'scam campaign' operators — for trademark infringement: Capital One is suing unknown defendants, alleging that they use automated or prerecorded calls posing as representatives for the bank. . 2026-05-13: 'Bond markets on edge' as King Charles sets out fragile UK government's agenda: U.K. gilts and bonds faced heavy selling pressure in response to the latest 'Starmer drama', as the prime minister faced down rivals ahead of the King's Speech.. 2026-05-13: Morgan Stanley boosts price targets for China indexes, sees upside through 2Q 2027: China's highly competitive supply chain also makes the country best and China's Leapmotor is seen as a watershed moment for the future of European carmaking.. 2026-05-13: SoftBank posts $46 billion gain at Vision Fund driven mainly by massive OpenAI bet: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI. . 2026-05-13: European markets close higher, UK gilts volatile as pressure mounts on PM Starmer: European stocks bucked the negative sentiment seen in Tuesday's session by closing higher on Wednesday.. 2026-05-13: CNBC Daily Open: Huang on, Nvidia is on the China Starmer’s EU push faces a harsh political reality: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer has alighted on resetting relations with Europe as a way of reviving his flagging popularity.. 2026-05-13: India hikes bullion import duties as the world's second-largest gold market faces a declining rupee: The government has imposed a 10% basic customs duty and a 5% tax on gold and silver imports, as per electrolyte packets with no artificial dyes as part of Kraft Heinz makeover: Parent company Kraft Heinz is trying to reverse slumping sales by modernizing many of its legacy brands.
